issues.description: Effect is completely missing the first ability. DSL only contains a SearchDeck action, but the card text describes: (1) Place all Characters except this one at bottom of deck, (2) Take an extra turn. Neither action is implemented.
Second ability [Activate: Main] is entirely missing from DSL. Should include: trigger Activated, condition Once Per Turn, cost ➀, action to add DON!! from DON!! deck and set as active.
SearchDeck with filter 'Any' and destination 'board' does not match card text. The first ability requires returning Characters to bottom of deck (ReturnToHand with destination deck), not searching.
